rationale: First non-baseline move targets the main Mac mini bottleneck: step throughput. I fused Q/K/V into one projection to cut attention matmul/launch overhead, switched the default to MQA (`NUM_KV_HEADS=1`) to reduce KV bandwidth, shortened the default training context to 512 so fixed-token batches are cheaper, and lengthened warmdown to match the expected higher step count. This is a deliberate speed-for-more-updates hypothesis under the 600s cap, while preserving the real training/eval path and final roundtrip check.
title: Fuse QKV And Shorten Default Context
